text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've been playing this really hard puzzle game
recently.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It was easier than I expected at first, but every
time I clear a stage another one pops up...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I keep going and going, but it never ends. Before
I knew it, I pulled an all-nighter last night.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Now all the questions are buzzing around in my head... Yaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio looks incredibly sleepy all day.
